category_sources: source_facts.description says it emulates the Amstrad PCW on Unix, Windows and macOS; official JOYCE homepage says the same and notes ANNE/PcW16 emulation.
docs_sources: Official FAQ is linked from the JOYCE homepage and answers usage/configuration questions.
Official JOYCE homepage is the main project documentation and download surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official homepage distributes source archives, but no official source-control repository URL was found.
tags_sources: Official homepage says JOYCE uses SDL and incorporates ANNE for PcW16 emulation.
source_facts.description identifies Amstrad PCW emulation across Unix, Windows, and macOS.
